mapper.select: SELECT r.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.realname, ''), u.username) AS displayName, u.avatar AS avatar, 0 AS verified, NULL AS bio FROM ts_role_info r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.id = #{roleId} AND (r.status IS NULL OR r.status != 0) AND r.is_public = 1 LIMIT 1
